contract_plan.description: Full packed activation bus, current default contract.

final_result.fix_hint: Layer layer1_0_conv1 does not fit contract 'flat-bus': effective_input_width_bits=16384 and output_width_bits=16384 exceeds max_bus_width_bits=4096. Tag the LayerIR with contract_id='tiled-streaming' or a heavier contract.
final_result.classifier_reason: The orchestrator capability gate explicitly rejected this module before simulation: bus width 16384 bits (2048 channels × 8 bits) exceeds max_supported_bus_bits=4096. No local RTL repair can fix this; the contract must change to 'tiled-streaming' or equivalent to serialize the 2048-channel payload across multiple cycles.

available_contracts.description: Full packed activation bus, current default contract.
Channel-tiled stream contract that keeps each activation stream within the configured bus cap.
External-memory-backed weights contract for layers that cannot fit the simpler streaming contracts.
